notes: Ivory Coast have no confirmed suspensions but Wilfried Singo (hamstring) remains a doubt at right centre-back, while Amad Diallo has been dropped to the bench by coach Fae in a tactical rotation. Norway return to full strength after Solbakken's mass rotation vs France — Haaland, Ødegaard and Nusa are all back starting — with only right-back Julian Ryerson carrying a thigh concern.
home_scorers: Nicolas Pépé (in-form winger, scored twice vs Curaçao)
away_scorers: Erling Haaland (tournament top scorer, 4 goals, fully rested)
Alexander Sørloth (starting striker partner, physical aerial threat)
Martin Ødegaard (creative hub / set-piece delivery, back from rest)
